title: NovelAI Clone - PR 3: DeepSeek API & Editor Streaming Wiring
description: Implement js/api.js (70/30 context budgeting, Fetch SSE streaming), js/editor.js (locks, keystroke listeners, highlights), and js/main.js bootstrapping.

title: NovelAI Clone - PR 2: Lorebook & Storage
description: Implement js/storage.js (localStorage saving/loading, quota usage bar, JSON export/import) and js/lorebook.js (word-boundary case-insensitive key scanning, sorting by priority).

title: NovelAI Clone - PR 1: UI & Styles
description: Implement index.html structure, css/main.css, css/layout.css, css/components.css, and js/ui.js for basic layout, theme switching, and settings drawer controls.

title: Implement NovelAI Clone Epic
description: Develop a distraction-free story writing app using DeepSeek API, vanilla CSS themes, localStorage storage engine, Lorebook scanning, and streaming editor integration.
